details: mcp/amadeus already had default amadeus_env=test; this round made it load-bearing.
OAuth2 token endpoint now selects test vs production by amadeus_env.
Flights, locations, hotels, and activities Python wrappers receive the selected base URL and emit amadeus_env in MCP metadata/data.
Default test mode remains the default workload value.
validation: Local Jinja render probe resolved test credential paths plus https://test.api.amadeus.com/v1/security/oauth2/token, and production credential paths plus https://api.amadeus.com/v1/security/oauth2/token.

details: amadeus_credentials keychain map picks production paths only when amadeus_env == production; otherwise it preserves the existing test paths.

provisioning_recipe: Amadeus production access requires production credentials from Amadeus Self-Service before these secrets can be created.

5_smoke_limited.skip_reason: Production Amadeus secrets are not provisioned in GCP Secret Manager, so no paid production API calls were made.

default_test_mode_probe.note: Registered patched playbook on local kind and confirmed default test-mode execution completed with Amadeus OAuth bound. Secret/token values were intentionally not copied into this result file.

verdict: Code switch landed and merged in ops#72. Production smoke is pending Amadeus production secret provisioning; no paid production calls were made.
notes: No Amadeus production credentials were provisioned or read by value.
The local kind status output contains test credential/token values, but those values were not copied into this result file.
The installed noetl CLI is 2.8.4 and has no validate subcommand, so validation used the repository Playbook Pydantic model.
deferred_followups: Provision amadeus-production-client-id and amadeus-production-client-secret in GCP Secret Manager and grant noetl-worker-mcp secretAccessor.
Run the tightly limited production smoke: get_token, one locations call, one flights call.
If production endpoints prove stable, consider registering production-mode travel smoke as an explicit opt-in operational runbook, not a regression matrix.
